How to Use the Upsell Page Template
Hi, this is Saba. And today I want to walk you through the upsell page template, just to give
you an idea of how to use this. And some of the flexibility you do have with this template.
Remember none of these templates are supposed to be direct, copy and paste that you just
fill in. And you're done a lot of these.
[00:00:16] You're going to customize still for your offer and play around with different
elements. So ideally what you're doing with these is you're taking the template and you're
studying sort of like the outline and the framework, and then you're going in and putting in a
little bit of a creative spin on it so that it's not a carbon copy of the template itself.
[00:00:33] So just remember to keep that in mind, use these elements as guidelines of what
is, what makes a good upsell page, but feel free to, to add other elements. If you feel it's
necessary to support your offer, before you actually use this template, I would highly
recommend you watch the upsells training because there are different ways to write upsell
pages.
[00:00:52] And you're going to find that some upsell pages don't require as much copy.

this is an example page that you could create from scratch if you want it to.

you know, you don't want to miss out on this opportunity or you could make the mistake
